productDisplayName: Hanes Men Black Knitted Lounge Pants
description: Style NoteThis Summer beat the heat and chill out at home with these lounge pants from hanes. The luxurious cotton fabric not only retains its shape even after repeated washes, but also offers superior comfort. And with the ComfortSoft fabric covering the elasticated waistband, be assured of a pinch-free comfortable Fit, while you can further customise the fitting with the drawstring. Wear this with sporty or casual T-shirts and revel in a comfortable lifestyle.Product DetailsFull length black knit pants with print on left thigh, two slit pockets at side-seam, red piping at side seam, grey yoke with dark grey piping detail, brand badge on left side seam, elasticized waistband with drawstringMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash with like coloursLow ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size XL
